chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 109 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of MA No.824/2023 (561-A CrPC) 14.09.2023 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate for applicant/surety. Mr. Mir Ali Nawaz Jagirani, Special Prosecutor NAB..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant application, applicant Aurangzaib seeks return of surety furnished by him before Additional Registrar of this Court. Initially, this Court, vide order dated 26.01.2021, granted interim pre-arrest bail to accused Mehtab Ali in Reference No.13 of 2019 (Re: State versus Abdul Hameed and others) in the sum of Rs.500,000/- with P.R. bonk in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Accordingly, applicant stood surety on behalf of said accused by submitting original Solvency Certificate No.03 dated 22.01.2021, issued by Mukhtiarkar, Larkano. Thereafter, vide order dated 20.10.2021, interim pre- arrest bail was converted into protective bail for a period of ten days against the surety already furnished by accused. Subsequently, on 28.10.2021, he surrendered before the trial Court and obtained interim pre-arrest bail, and finally, on 10.03.2023, the above Reference has been returned back by learned Accountability Court-I, Sukkur to NAB authorities for presenting the same before competent Court/forum, as is evident from the orders attached with the application. The report of Accountant of this Court reflects that aforesaid surety is still lying in the office of this Court. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB, conceding the above facts, extends his no objection to grant of this application.

The report of Accountant of this Court reflects that aforesaid surety is still lying in the office of this Court. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB, conceding the above facts, extends his no objection to grant of this application. In view of above, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document mentioned above to applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. Let copy of this order be sent to the Mukhtiarkar concerned. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
